navSections.title: Identity & access
navSections.blurb: Who is calling and what they may do — JWT/OAuth as used by HTTP APIs are summarized in API Design; this track is the full identity story.

navSections.title: Application security
navSections.blurb: Common abuse patterns against services and browsers — complements input validation in API Design.

navSections.title: Data & operations
navSections.blurb: Protecting data at rest and in config — secret sprawl is a cloud and CI/CD problem too.
